name: Classic Mud Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/2 cup chocolate chips and butter over hot (not boiling) water, stirring until the chips are melted and the mixture is smooth. Add chocolate wafer crumbs, stirring until well blended. Press into a 9-inch pie pan. Chill until firm.
2. For the Fudge Sauce: Combine remaining 1 1/4 cups chocolate chips, heavy cream, and butter over hot (not boiling) water, stirring until the chips are melted and the mixture is smooth. Remove from heat, stir in coffee-flavored liqueur. Chill for 10 minutes.
3. Spread half of the Fudge Sauce on the bottom crust. Chill for an additional 15 minutes.
4. For the Filling: In a large bowl, combine softened coffee ice cream and coffee-flavored liqueur. Pour over the Fudge Sauce layer in the pie pan. Freeze several hours or until firm.
5. Serve with remaining warm Fudge Sauce and whipped cream, if used. Makes 1 9-inch pie.
